assertionResults.observation: Real MetaMask native submissions used reviewed value, reserved ETH for gas, and requested no ERC-20 approval for ETH.
Canonical swap, add, partial withdrawal, and full withdrawal receipts reconciled gas and asset deltas.
Review exposed wrapped-native refund semantics; the executed add produced no undisclosed native-side residue.
The wrapper selected as ERC-20 remained address-identifiable and used allowance semantics rather than native value.
Wrong-value, gas, stale-context, rejection, revert, and native-receive failures remained non-success with fresh-review recovery.

environment.stack: Feather native pool workspace with RPC and indexer
